_readme: Per-game per-platform follower targets (sum across all regions).
Keys under each game are platform names exactly as used in GAMES ('youtube','x','instagram','facebook','discord').
Game keys match the 'id' field in GAMES: 'epic7', 'czn', 'l9'.
Set a number to enable the KPI progress bar. Remove a key or set 0 to hide it.
To edit without cloning: open this file on GitHub.com and click the pencil icon.
The fetch script reads this file on every run; no code changes needed to update targets.
